problem: Why can salamanders regenerate limbs but humans cannot — what gene pathway?
hypothesis: Mitochondrial membrane potential modulation may resolve Why can salamanders regenerate limbs but humans cannot — what gene pathway? by activating at the molecular level.

experiment.protocol: Retrospective cohort analysis with 29 month follow-up. Control group receives placebo/sham.

wisdom: Real knowledge is to know the extent of one's ignorance. — Confucius
